title: Echoing as One: Infinite Garden Artist Cohort | TCE - DevConnect Buenos Aires
description:
Echoing as One: Infinite Garden Artist Cohort 
An exhibition talk exploring XR, AI, VR, light, performance and the future of digital art.

Speakers:
• Tomo Saito (Ethereum Foundation) — @tomosaito
• Clementine Esquivel — @duodomusica
• Santiago Reos — @duodomusica
• Felina Beckenbauer
• Inhwa Yeom — @yinhwa_art
• Magdalena Molinari — @maggiemolinari
• Sevenfloor — @0xsevenfloor
• tinyrainboot — @tinyrainboot
